title: pelargonium × infundibuliforme
intro: Pelargonium × infundibuliforme, also known as Rose Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Geranium genus, native to South Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including anxiety, stress, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Pelargonium × infundibuliforme include its ability to regulate hormonal imbalances, improve sleep quality, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × infundibuliforme include essential oil, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
